zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis於1307年出生時，他的父親Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton39歲，母親Hawise de la Pole16歲。他於1329年與Maud Mortimer在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1360年8月30日在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis于1307年出生时，他的父亲Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton39岁，母亲Hawise de la Pole16岁。他于1329年与Maud Mortimer在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1360年8月30日在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis was born in 1307, his father, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, was 39 and his mother, Hawise de la Pole, was 16. He married Maud Mortimer in 1329, in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 30 August 1360, in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis est né en 1307, son père, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Hawise de la Pole, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Maud Mortimer en 1329, à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 août 1360, à Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis 1307 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton 39 und seine Mutter Hawise de la Pole 16. Er hat 1329 in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Maud Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. August 1360 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis è nato il nel 1307, il suo padre, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de la Pole, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Maud Mortimer nel 1329, nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 agosto 1360, nel Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powisが1307年に生まれた時，父Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherletonは39歳，母Hawise de la Poleは16歳であった。1329年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルでMaud Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1360年8月30日にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアウエルシュプオオルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis(이)가 1307년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de la Pole(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1329년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 Maud Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 8월 30일 웨일스 몽고머이실르 웰쉬포에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis nasceu em 1307, seu pai, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de la Pole, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Mortimer em 1329, em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1360, em Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis родился в 1307 г., его отцу по имени Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de la Pole, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Mortimer в 1329 г. в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 августа 1360 г. в местности велшпул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cherleton 2nd Baron Cherleton of Powis nació en 1307, su papá, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Hawise de la Pole, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Maud Mortimer en 1329, en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1360, en Welshpool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 53 años.
